message.fcw.team.required: You must belong to an FTB party team to use FCW.
message.fcw.core.leader_required: Only the faction leader can place or relocate the faction core.
message.fcw.core.already_exists: Your faction already has a core.
message.fcw.core.placed: Faction core placed and the core chunk has been claimed.
message.fcw.core.core_chunk_claimed: The core chunk is already claimed by another faction.
message.fcw.core.not_yours: That core does not belong to your faction.
message.fcw.core.packed: That faction core is currently packed and must be placed again before it can be managed.
message.fcw.core.invalid_target: That relocation target is not valid.
message.fcw.core.target_not_claimed: You can only relocate the core into your own claimed territory.
message.fcw.core.relocation_cooldown: That core was moved too recently.
message.fcw.core.raid_locked: You cannot pack the core while your faction is in an active raid.
message.fcw.core.packed_item_given: Faction core packed. Your upgrades and progression were preserved in the returned core item.
message.fcw.core.display_item_missing: Hold an item in your main hand to copy it into a hologram slot.
message.fcw.claims.manual_blocked: FCW blocks direct FTB Chunks claiming and unclaiming for this faction.
message.fcw.claims.invalid_existing_shap: Existing faction claims do not match FCW's deterministic expansion order. Repair the faction state before applying more progression.
message.fcw.claims.no_available_space: FCW could not find enough nearby claimable chunks for this upgrade.
message.fcw.raid.cost_missing: You do not have the required items to forge a raid beacon.
message.fcw.raid.item_created: Raid beacon forged and bound to your faction.
message.fcw.raid.invalid_item: That raid beacon is not bound to your current faction.
message.fcw.raid.invalid_target: That target is not a valid enemy faction core.
message.fcw.raid.allied_blocked: Allied raiding is disabled by FCW config.
message.fcw.raid.already_active: One of those factions is already in an active raid.
message.fcw.raid.started_defender: %s has started a raid against your faction core.
message.fcw.raid.attackers_win: Raid successful. The defending core was destroyed and its territory collapsed.
message.fcw.raid.defenders_win: Raid failed. The defenders held their core.
screen.fcw.faction_core.title: Faction Core
screen.fcw.faction_core.claims_hint: Structured claims remain server-authoritative and deterministic.
screen.fcw.faction_core.actions_hint: Forge siege tools, inspect faction state, and relocate with validated authority.
screen.fcw.faction_core.pack_core_hint: Packs the deployed core into an item so a leader can place it again elsewhere without losing upgrades.
screen.fcw.faction_core.section_overview: Fast faction status, claim pressure, and raid telemetry.
screen.fcw.faction_core.section_logistic: Core handling, protected radius, and move-readiness.
screen.fcw.faction_core.recipe_drawer_hi: Open the side recipe drawer for the live raid forge layout.
screen.fcw.faction_core.recipe_next_flat: No extra scaling ingredients are configured.
screen.fcw.faction_core.display_slot_emp: Hologram slot %s is empty. Left click with an item in hand to set it.
screen.fcw.faction_core.logistics_summar: The core now separates dense detail into tabs so the main window stays readable during raids and day-to-day management.
screen.fcw.faction_core.logistics_detail: Breach zone visuals track a %s block radius. Leader relocation ready: %s.
screen.fcw.faction_core.popup_overview_b: %s is running %s upgrades, currently sustaining %s/%s claim capacity. %s
screen.fcw.faction_core.popup_recipe_bod: This forge currently uses craft count %s. The next craft jumps to %s. Scaling deltas: %s
screen.fcw.faction_core.popup_logistics_: Leader relocation available: %s. The world ring and particles track a %s block ground radius around the core.
screen.fcw.faction_core.popup_hint: Open a focused intel overlay for the current tab.
